comprehension.question: What costume was the speaker wearing in the photo?
comprehension.hint_ja: 写真で話者が身につけていたコスチュームは？

comprehension.question: Who sent the speaker a handwritten letter?
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者に手書きの手紙を送った人は？

comprehension.question: What did Bill Clinton's letter congratulate the speaker on?
comprehension.hint_ja: ビル・クリントンの手紙は何を祝っていましたか？

comprehension.question: What topic was the speaker originally going to discuss?
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者が元々話そうとしていたトピックは？

comprehension.question: What did the speaker decide to focus on instead?
options: What people asked him to elaborate on about climate
comprehension.hint_ja: 代わりに何に焦点を当てることにしましたか？

comprehension.question: What does the speaker compare updating his slideshow to?
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者はスライドショーの更新を何に例えましたか？

comprehension.question: What did the speaker say about coming back to TED?
options: He planned to make it a lifelong habit
comprehension.hint_ja: TEDに戻ることについて話者は何と言いましたか？

comprehension.question: What specific policy did the speaker propose in this segment?
What scientific data did the speaker present first?
options: No data was presented in this segment

comprehension.question: What country did the speaker use as a positive example?
options: No country was highlighted in this segment

emphasis_identification.sentence: What can you do about the climate crisis?
emphasis_identification.question: Which word did the speaker emphasize most?
emphasis_identification.hint_ja: この文で話者が最も強調した語はどれですか？

attitude_estimation.question: What was the speaker's tone in the opening anecdote?
attitude_estimation.hint_ja: 冒頭のエピソード（anecdote）での話者のトーンは？

prosodic_structure.question: When transitioning from the anecdote to the climate topic, the speaker...
options: Made an abrupt shift without transition
Stopped and asked the audience a question
prosodic_structure.hint_ja: エピソードから気候変動の話題に移るとき、話者は…
